criteria.name: controls_are_keyboard_accessible
criteria.description: All interactive controls — mode switch, Filters, About, Reset filters, Undo, Redo, Export timeline, Import timeline, form fields, scrubber thumbs, bulk actions, detail Previous/Next — are keyboard accessible with Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, or Space.

criteria.name: modals_manage_focus
criteria.description: About modal, Filters drawer, and Export drawer trap focus and return it to the originating control on close.

criteria.name: images_and_icons_have_alt_text
criteria.description: All images and icons have descriptive alt text or accessible names.

criteria.name: feedback_uses_live_regions
criteria.description: Validation errors, import errors, and Copied confirmations are conveyed both visually and via ARIA live regions.

criteria.name: forms_have_explicit_labels
criteria.description: All create/edit and import form elements use explicit label elements.

criteria.name: headings_follow_logical_order
criteria.description: Headings follow a logical order with no skips, such as H1 to H2 to H3.

criteria.name: landmark_navigation_is_present
criteria.description: Skip-to-content or landmark navigation (main/header/nav) is present.

criteria.name: text_and_controls_have_contrast
criteria.description: All text and controls have sufficient color contrast.

criteria.name: semantic_html_roles_are_used
criteria.description: Semantic HTML roles such as nav, main, and button are used for chrome and overlays.

criteria.name: reduced_motion_is_respected
criteria.description: Animations respect the prefers-reduced-motion setting while pan/scrub/filter remain usable.

criteria.name: escape_closes_topmost_overlay
criteria.description: Escape closes the topmost of About, Filters drawer, Export drawer, or detail panel.

criteria.name: arrows_step_detail_when_open
criteria.description: ArrowLeft/ArrowRight step Previous/Next while a detail is open and are suppressed while typing in a field.

criteria.name: multi_facet_round_trip
criteria.description: Multi-facet round-trip: create an event, toggle a category, set a search, narrow the year window, then reload. All facets coherently reset to the seeded baseline (in-memory genre) — never a mix of surviving and reset facets.

criteria.name: sort_reversal_proves_live_data
criteria.description: Chronology proof: with mixed years visible, note Library order (earliest to latest); after creating an event with a year earlier than the first row, it appears before that row; after creating one later than the last visible row (within filters), it appears after — proving order is derived from live years rather than a hardcoded list.

criteria.name: derived_view_responds_to_input
criteria.description: Derived-view sensitivity: change the year window or category filter and confirm the category tally and visible pin set change meaningfully rather than redrawing identically regardless of input.

criteria.name: cross_view_echo_without_reload
criteria.description: Cross-view echo: create or edit an event in Library/Filter mode and confirm the same title/year/type/mediaRefs appear on the stage pin and in an open detail without reload; export preview also reflects the change.

criteria.name: count_delta_is_exact
criteria.description: Count-delta integrity: measure the visible event count immediately before and after a create; the delta is exactly +1. Repeat for delete with exactly -1.

criteria.name: different_inputs_change_outcomes
criteria.description: Input-dependent output: create two events with distinct titles, types, timestamps, mediaRefs, and years; the Library shows both distinct titles and the export JSON events array contains both distinct titles with matching type/timestamp/mediaRefs and years.

criteria.name: interleaved_flows_preserve_state
criteria.description: Interleaved-flow integrity: start creating event A, switch to Scrub/Explore, return and finish creating event B, then open Export — both intended events exist and neither flow corrupted the other's fields.

criteria.name: empty_to_repopulated_round_trip
criteria.description: Edge-state round-trip: drive user-managed events to empty (empty state visible), then create one valid event; Library, tally, and export totals track through both transitions.

criteria.name: undo_round_trip_restores_export
criteria.description: Undo round-trip: create Signal Tower Demo, confirm export JSON contains that title, Undo, confirm export no longer contains that title and the count dropped by one, then Redo and confirm the title returns in export.

criteria.name: import_export_byte_stable_titles
criteria.description: Import/export round-trip: after two creates, export JSON, clear user events, import the pack, and confirm a fresh export's events array contains the same two titles with the same type, timestamp, and mediaRefs values.

criteria.name: api_payload_round_trip_in_export
criteria.description: Create Signal Tower Demo with type First Appearance, timestamp 1920-01-01T00:00:00.000Z, and mediaRefs containing signal-tower-demo; open Export — the JSON events entry for that title carries those exact type, timestamp, and mediaRefs values and document is media-history-timeline.

criteria.name: stage_opens_with_seeded_pins
criteria.description: On load, Scrub/Explore mode shows a timeline stage with seeded event pins or markers for MediaHistoryTimeline

criteria.name: library_shows_seeded_events
criteria.description: On load (or after opening Library/Filter), the events list shows multiple seeded events with title and year visible

criteria.name: create_signal_tower_demo_visible
criteria.description: After creating an event titled Signal Tower Demo with valid HistoryEvent fields (type, timestamp ending with Z, mediaRefs, year, place, categories, summary, detail), the text Signal Tower Demo is visible in the events list

criteria.name: three_creates_add_three_rows
criteria.description: After adding 3 new events on top of the initial user-managed count, the list shows exactly 3 more rows than before those creates

criteria.name: category_filter_narrows_visible_set
criteria.description: After filtering by a category/band (with mixed categories present), only matching events remain visible in the filtered list or stage

criteria.name: edit_title_to_evening_broadcast
criteria.description: After editing an event title to Evening Broadcast, the text Evening Broadcast is visible and the previous title is not

criteria.name: delete_removes_title_from_list
criteria.description: After deleting an event, that event's title is no longer visible in the events list

criteria.name: empty_state_after_clearing_user_events
criteria.description: After deleting all user-managed events (or clearing the editable set), an empty state is visible in the list region

criteria.name: empty_title_rejected_with_feedback
criteria.description: After submitting create with an empty required title, the events count does not increase and validation feedback naming title is visible

criteria.name: scrubber_updates_visible_pins
criteria.description: After adjusting the year scrubber/window, the set of visible pins or in-view count updates without full page navigation

criteria.name: mode_switch_without_reload
criteria.description: After switching between Scrub/Explore and Library/Filter modes, the main canvas shows the other mode without full page navigation

criteria.name: hover_feedback_on_pins_and_chrome
criteria.description: When hovering pins, list rows, or scrubber controls, a visible hover wash, scale, or glow appears

criteria.name: detail_next_prev_wraps
criteria.description: Click a pin to open its detail panel with title and summary, then use Next/Previous and confirm stepping wraps around at the ends of the sorted filtered set

criteria.name: pan_and_wheel_zoom_live
criteria.description: Drag the stage to pan and use the wheel to zoom; confirm the pins reposition and the year-range readout changes without full page navigation

criteria.name: filter_and_search_recompute
criteria.description: Toggle a category filter and type in the search box; confirm the visible pins and list recompute to matching events

criteria.name: console_clean_during_session
criteria.description: No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session

criteria.name: crud_updates_shared_collection
criteria.description: Timeline events collection supports create, edit, and delete with list rows and derived counts updating from shared application state

criteria.name: two_interaction_modes
criteria.description: At least two distinct views or interaction modes are switchable without full page navigation

criteria.name: filters_recompute_from_shared_collection
criteria.description: Domain state beyond CRUD is implemented (filters, year window, category tally) and recomputes visible results from the shared collection

criteria.name: detail_panel_fields_and_stepping
criteria.description: Selecting a pin opens an in-page detail panel with a year-and-place kicker, title, type, mediaRefs list, category pills, summary, and detail, plus Previous/Next controls that step through the sorted filtered events with wraparound

criteria.name: combined_filters_chronological
criteria.description: Filtering combines category toggles (an event shows when any of its categories is active), a live text search across title/place/summary/detail, and the year window, recomputing the visible pins and list chronologically

criteria.name: dual_handle_scrubber_full_span
criteria.description: A dual-handle footer scrubber sets the from/to years with handles that cannot cross and keep a minimum gap, a Full span control fits the whole corpus, and a readout shows the current range in BCE/CE form

criteria.name: escape_and_arrow_detail_keys
criteria.description: Escape closes the topmost of the About modal, Filters drawer, Export drawer, or detail panel, and ArrowLeft/ArrowRight step Previous/Next while a detail is open (suppressed while typing in a field)

criteria.name: create_flow_pin_appears_cross_mode
criteria.description: Scripted create flow: in Library/Filter mode, note the visible event count, then submit a valid HistoryEvent (including type, Z-timestamp, mediaRefs, and detail) whose year lies inside the current year window and whose category is active. Exactly one new row appears in the Library list showing title and type and any visible count increases by exactly one (measured immediately around the submit); switching back to Scrub/Explore mode then shows a new pin for that event on the stage — all without a reload

criteria.name: edit_flow_updates_list_pin_and_detail
criteria.description: Scripted edit flow: edit an event's title, type, mediaRefs, and year, then confirm the same record updated everywhere it appears — the Library row shows the new title and type, the pin's position on the stage moved to reflect the new year, and an open detail panel for that event shows the edited type/mediaRefs/year — without a reload

criteria.name: delete_flow_clears_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Scripted delete flow: with an event selected (detail open), delete it. Its Library row disappears, its pin leaves the stage, the selection/detail panel clears, and the visible count decreases by exactly one (measured immediately around the delete)

criteria.name: filter_flow_stage_and_list_in_sync
criteria.description: Scripted filter flow: toggling a category off removes that category's pins from the stage and its rows from the Library list at the same time; toggling it back on restores both; narrowing the year window with the scrubber drops out-of-range events from both surfaces simultaneously — the two surfaces never disagree about what is visible

criteria.name: filtered_detail_stepping_wraps_with_highlight
criteria.description: Scripted stepping flow: with a search or category filter active, open an event's detail and press Next repeatedly — stepping visits only the currently filtered events in chronological order, wraps from the last back to the first, and the stage highlight follows the stepped selection

criteria.name: chrome_controls_drawer_modal_reset
criteria.description: Filters opens a drawer, About opens an in-page modal, and Reset filters restores the default categories, clears the search, and returns to the default year window

criteria.name: default_year_window_bounded
criteria.description: On a fresh load the visible year window opens on a bounded default range (for example roughly 1450-1920) rather than the full ~3200 BCE to 2024 CE span, as shown by the range readout and the plotted pins

criteria.name: seed_corpus_scale_and_span
criteria.description: The seeded corpus is substantial — on the order of dozens of events (target roughly 60) — spanning roughly 3200 BCE to 2024 CE across the twelve closed categories, with every seeded event carrying type, timestamp ending with Z, mediaRefs, and detail (verify by fitting the full span and inspecting Library/detail/export)

criteria.name: double_submit_adds_exactly_one
criteria.description: Double-activating the create form's submit control in quick succession adds exactly one event: the visible count increases by one and exactly one new row appears

criteria.name: full_span_after_narrow_zoom
criteria.description: After zooming the year window to a narrow slice, activating the Full span control fits the entire corpus range again, as shown by the readout and pins across the whole span

criteria.name: long_title_truncates_with_ellipsis
criteria.description: An event with a very long title is truncated with an ellipsis in its Library row and shown in full in the detail panel

criteria.name: empty_state_offers_recovery_control
criteria.description: When the filters, search, and year window match nothing, the list/stage region shows a visible empty state with a message and a working control to reset filters or create an event, and using that control recovers from the empty state

criteria.name: inline_errors_and_disabled_submit
criteria.description: In the create/edit form, an inline error message naming the field appears next to an empty title, a type outside the closed enum, a non-Z or cross-field-invalid timestamp, empty or over-limit mediaRefs, empty place, empty summary, empty detail, missing categories, or an invalid year before submit, and the submit control stays disabled until every required field is valid

criteria.name: library_rows_stream_in_on_fast_scroll
criteria.description: Scrolling fast through the full seeded corpus in the Library list shows rows appearing as they enter the viewport, with no blank gaps left behind

criteria.name: shift_scroll_slides_year_window
criteria.description: Shift-scroll (or horizontal scroll) over the stage slides the visible year window earlier or later in time, live and without reload

criteria.name: api_field_contract_on_create
criteria.description: A valid create requires the HistoryEvent contract: title, type (exactly one of First Appearance, Mass Adoption, Standardization, Obsoletion, Commemoration), ISO-8601 timestamp ending with Z that satisfies the year cross-field rule, mediaRefs (1–6 labels), year (-3200 to 2024 integer), place, one or more closed categories, summary, and detail; the Library row and detail panel show those same field values for the new event

criteria.name: year_bounds_rejected
criteria.description: Submitting a year below -3200 or above 2024 (or a non-integer year) shows an inline error naming year and does not increase the events count

criteria.name: category_tally_tracks_visible_set
criteria.description: A live category tally strip shows counts per active category for the currently visible filtered set and recomputes when filters, search, year window, create, edit, delete, bulk actions, undo, or redo change the set

criteria.name: bulk_set_category_and_delete
criteria.description: In Library/Filter mode, checking at least 2 rows and applying bulk Set category merges the chosen closed-enum category into each checked event without removing unrelated tags; bulk Delete with confirm removes every checked row and the visible count drops by exactly that number

criteria.name: undo_redo_create_round_trip
criteria.description: After creating an event, Undo removes that row and restores the prior visible count and category tally; Redo restores the created event; Undo and Redo are disabled when their stacks are empty

criteria.name: export_drawer_json_csv_live
criteria.description: Export timeline opens a drawer with Timeline JSON and Events CSV tabs compiled live from the store; after creating Signal Tower Demo (type First Appearance, timestamp 1920-01-01T00:00:00.000Z, mediaRefs containing signal-tower-demo) and Evening Broadcast (type Mass Adoption), both titles appear in the JSON events array with matching type/timestamp/mediaRefs, document is media-history-timeline, CSV contains both titles under the contract header, and totals.eventCount equals the live collection length

criteria.name: export_download_and_copy
criteria.description: Download JSON offers timeline-pack.json matching the JSON tab, Download CSV offers timeline-events.csv matching the CSV tab, and Copy on the active tab shows a visible Copied confirmation

criteria.name: import_round_trip_reconstructs
criteria.description: After mutations, export JSON, clear to an empty/user-cleared state, then Import that JSON — Library list, stage pins, year window, filters, and category tally match the export, and a fresh export's events array matches

criteria.name: export_events_carry_api_fields
criteria.description: After a valid create, the Timeline JSON events entry for that event includes type from the closed enum, timestamp ending with Z, mediaRefs as a non-empty array, and detail, matching the submitted HistoryEvent payload

criteria.name: csv_header_matches_history_event_contract
criteria.description: The Events CSV tab header is exactly title,type,timestamp,mediaRefs,year,place,categories,summary,detail with categories pipe-joined and mediaRefs semicolon-joined on data lines

criteria.name: closed_type_and_category_enums
criteria.description: Create/edit type choices are limited to First Appearance, Mass Adoption, Standardization, Obsoletion, and Commemoration, and category filters expose exactly the twelve closed labels Oral Culture, Manuscript, Print Press, Telegraph, Telephone, Radio, Television, Recording, Computing, Networks, Mobile, and Social Media

criteria.name: timestamp_year_cross_field_enforced
criteria.description: Submitting a CE year with a timestamp whose UTC calendar year does not equal that year, or a BCE year with a timestamp other than 0001-01-01T00:00:00.000Z, shows an inline error naming timestamp or year and does not add an event

criteria.name: spacing_and_sizing_follow_scale
criteria.description: Spacing and sizing follow a coherent scale across stage, scrubber, Library, and export drawer, with no arbitrary one-off values visibly breaking alignment.

criteria.name: typography_matches_spec
criteria.description: Typography matches the instruction: expressive headings/body (not Inter/Roboto/system defaults) with clear hierarchy on stage and detail.

criteria.name: layout_matches_reference
criteria.description: Layout matches reference screenshots to within a small tolerance at desktop — stage, scrubber/footer, and chrome composition — with instruction text winning on conflicts.

criteria.name: specified_state_changes_animate
criteria.description: Transitions or animations are applied to the state changes the spec calls out (detail open/close, list add/remove, drawer enter/exit, export drawer).

criteria.name: responsive_behavior_matches_reference
criteria.description: Responsive behavior matches the instruction patterns (desktop stage+scrubber visible; <=768 reflow; 375 no horizontal page scroll).

criteria.name: control_styling_matches_spec
criteria.description: Button and form radii, padding, and states conform to a coherent styled chrome look rather than unstyled browser defaults.

criteria.name: typography_has_clear_hierarchy
criteria.description: Typography has a clear hierarchy that distinguishes brand, detail title, and body text.

criteria.name: component_states_match_spec
criteria.description: Component states (default, hover, active, disabled, error) match the instruction where specified, including disabled Undo/Redo.

criteria.name: surface_treatments_match_spec
criteria.description: Color, depth, and paper-stage surface treatments are precise per the instruction's warm/cool atmosphere.

criteria.name: microinteractions_match_spec
criteria.description: Microinteraction feedback for hover and press follows the instruction (pin/row wash, scrubber brighten, focus rings).

criteria.name: empty_state_is_present
criteria.description: Empty state UI is present and renders when filters match nothing or all user-managed events are deleted, with a message and a reset/create control

criteria.name: forms_validate_inline
criteria.description: Inline validation appears on create/edit before submit for empty title, type outside the closed enum, non-Z or cross-field-invalid timestamp, empty mediaRefs, empty place, summary, detail, missing categories, and invalid year, naming each field

criteria.name: errors_are_actionable
criteria.description: Error messages name the field and the fix rather than only saying Invalid

criteria.name: actions_show_confirmation
criteria.description: Success or confirmation feedback appears after actions such as Copy (Copied) or completed import

criteria.name: async_work_shows_loading_state
criteria.description: Where import or export compilation takes noticeable time, a loading or regenerating indication is visible; otherwise rapid preview updates still leave the UI responsive

criteria.name: destructive_actions_support_undo_or_cancel
criteria.description: Undo is available after create/edit/delete/bulk mutations, and bulk Delete requires an explicit confirm step

criteria.name: non_obvious_controls_have_help
criteria.description: About/help overlay or tooltips explain scrubbing, filtering, or export for non-obvious controls

criteria.name: controls_use_semantic_tags
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, and labels use semantic tags for chrome, forms, and bulk actions

criteria.name: modal_supports_close_paths
criteria.description: Modal/drawer close controls and Escape both close About, Filters, and Export overlays

criteria.name: long_flows_show_progress
criteria.description: Export drawer tab switches and import paste/validate provide visible progress or immediate preview feedback

criteria.name: scrubber_handles_cannot_cross
criteria.description: Dragging one scrubber handle into the other stops at the minimum gap and the range readout never shows an inverted range

criteria.name: year_out_of_bounds_rejected
criteria.description: A year below -3200 or above 2024 is rejected with an inline error naming year and does not change the collection

criteria.name: bulk_with_none_checked_is_noop
criteria.description: Bulk Set category and bulk Delete with no rows checked perform no destructive change

criteria.name: malformed_import_rejected
criteria.description: Importing malformed JSON, document not media-history-timeline, or a pack missing required HistoryEvent fields (bad type, non-Z timestamp, empty mediaRefs, year/timestamp mismatch, or empty detail) shows an inline error naming the import field and leaves collection, filters, and stage unchanged

criteria.name: undo_redo_noop_when_empty
criteria.description: Undo with nothing to undo and Redo with nothing to redo leave the collection unchanged; controls show disabled treatment

criteria.name: empty_export_still_valid_shape
criteria.description: With an empty user-managed set (or empty collection where allowed), Export still produces JSON with version 1, document media-history-timeline, live yearWindow/filters, events covering remaining rows (each carrying type, timestamp, and mediaRefs) or empty, and totals that match; Copy still shows Copied

criteria.name: media_refs_bounds_rejected
criteria.description: Submitting create with zero mediaRefs or more than six mediaRefs shows an inline error naming mediaRefs and does not increase the events count

criteria.name: wrong_document_import_rejected
criteria.description: Importing a Timeline JSON whose document field is not exactly media-history-timeline shows an inline error naming document or the import field and leaves the collection unchanged

criteria.name: export_summary_or_mutation_chip
criteria.description: Beyond the required export drawer, a polished archive-operator touch is visible — for example a compact export summary naming eventCount and the active year window above the preview, or a last-mutation chip naming the most recent create/edit/delete.

criteria.name: keyboard_shortcuts_for_undo_redo
criteria.description: Beyond required toolbar buttons, keyboard shortcuts for Undo/Redo are available and visibly change the collection when used.

criteria.name: guided_about_onboarding
criteria.description: The About/help overlay provides guided how-to copy for scrubbing, filtering, and exporting that helps a first-time operator.

criteria.name: tally_or_era_readout_polish
criteria.description: The category tally or era-band labeling provides extra usability beyond a bare list of pins.

criteria.name: alternative_input_support
criteria.description: The app supports an alternative input path such as keyboard year-window nudges or command-style jump-to-year beyond the required scrubber.

criteria.name: preference_personalization
criteria.description: Optional personalization such as a remembered default year window within the session (without browser storage) is visible.

criteria.name: polished_brand_narrative
criteria.description: The brand header and About copy present a polished History of Media and Communication narrative without becoming a marketing landing.

criteria.name: dynamic_theming_beyond_requirements
criteria.description: Optional light paper-tone variants or density controls beyond the required atmosphere are available.

criteria.name: genre_appropriate_platform_features
criteria.description: Clipboard copy-with-confirmation and real file downloads for the timeline pack demonstrate polished export UX beyond a preview-only drawer.

criteria.name: competition_level_innovation
criteria.description: Competition-level polish is visible to users in stage, export, or bulk workflows beyond a minimal CRUD timeline.

criteria.name: innovation_catchall
criteria.description: The app demonstrates a noteworthy, browser-observable enhancement beyond the spec that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. The enhancement must plausibly matter to a real user, not be a nitpick. If present, name the enhancement and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot) that demonstrates it. If the enhancement is already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.

criteria.name: hover_wash_and_focus_rings
criteria.description: Real pointer hover on a pin or list row shows a scale, glow, or hover wash; hovering scrubber thumbs and chrome buttons brightens them; and keyboard focus shows a visible focus-visible ring on interactive controls (verify hover via computed style while hovering)

criteria.name: mode_switch_keeps_hover_feedback
criteria.description: Mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback

criteria.name: pan_and_wheel_zoom_live
criteria.description: Dragging the stage pans the pins and wheel-zoom narrows or widens the visible year window about its midpoint, live and without reload

criteria.name: detail_panel_settle_transition
criteria.description: Opening and closing the event detail panel via the real UI (clicking a pin or row, then closing) plays a short opacity/transform settle rather than appearing and disappearing instantly

criteria.name: list_row_add_remove_animates
criteria.description: Creating an event through the create form animates its row into the Library list, and deleting an event through the UI animates the row out rather than snapping, with the surrounding rows sliding smoothly into place

criteria.name: drawer_and_modal_slide_fade
criteria.description: The Filters drawer, About modal, and Export drawer enter and exit with a short slide/fade transition rather than appearing and disappearing instantly (opened via their chrome buttons)

criteria.name: feedback_messages_animate
criteria.description: Feedback messages (validation errors, Copied confirmation, import errors) appear with visible motion — a short slide or fade — and dismiss the same way

criteria.name: reduced_motion_preference_respected
criteria.description: With prefers-reduced-motion: reduce emulated, non-essential fades and settles are shortened or removed while panning, scrubbing, and filtering remain fully functional

criteria.name: bulk_delete_rows_animate_out
criteria.description: Bulk Delete animates each removed Library row out rather than snapping the entire list away in one frame

criteria.name: cold_start_is_under_two_seconds
criteria.description: Cold start to interactive is under 2 seconds on local render.

criteria.name: console_is_clean
criteria.description: Browser devtools show no errors or warnings during panning, filtering, CRUD, bulk, undo/redo, export, and import.

criteria.name: transitions_respond_under_100ms
criteria.description: UI transitions such as mode switch and export-drawer open respond without perceptible multi-second delay.

criteria.name: async_work_has_loading_indicators
criteria.description: Where export preview regeneration or import validation is noticeable, a loading or regenerating indication is shown; otherwise the UI stays responsive.

criteria.name: large_collections_render_without_lag
criteria.description: The ~60-event Library list and stage pins render and scroll without perceived lag.

criteria.name: state_changes_remain_interactive
criteria.description: The UI remains interactive during filter, create, undo, and export preview updates.

criteria.name: animations_maintain_smooth_frame_rate
criteria.description: Stage pan/scrub and list add/remove animations maintain a smooth frame rate during use.

criteria.name: rapid_input_does_not_freeze
criteria.description: The app does not hang or freeze under rapid scrubbing, filtering, or repeated create/undo.

criteria.name: export_tab_switch_regenerates_smoothly
criteria.description: Opening the export drawer and switching between Timeline JSON and Events CSV regenerates the preview without freezing the UI.

criteria.name: layout_adapts_desktop_to_mobile
criteria.description: Layout adapts gracefully from 1440px desktop to 375px mobile while keeping stage, scrubber, and Library reachable.

criteria.name: mobile_tap_targets_are_large_enough
criteria.description: UI controls are tap targets at least 44px on mobile.

criteria.name: typography_resizes_across_breakpoints
criteria.description: Typography resizes for both mobile and desktop.

criteria.name: content_avoids_clipping_and_overflow
criteria.description: Content never clips or overflows the viewport at required widths.

criteria.name: chrome_adapts_to_small_screens
criteria.description: Header chrome stacks or collapses at 768px and below while remaining operable.

criteria.name: stacking_reflows_logically
criteria.description: Layout stacking order reflows logically at narrow widths (Library uses full width; stage/scrubber remain usable).

criteria.name: mobile_touch_gestures_work
criteria.description: Touch gestures such as tap on pins/rows and scrubber thumbs work on mobile where present.

criteria.name: small_screens_avoid_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 375px width there is no page-level horizontal scrolling.

criteria.name: media_and_canvases_resize
criteria.description: The timeline stage/canvas sizes responsively to fit the layout.

criteria.name: fixed_controls_remain_accessible
criteria.description: Fixed controls (scrubber, mode switch, Export/Import) remain accessible on all devices.

criteria.name: export_drawer_usable_at_375
criteria.description: The export drawer and import control stay fully visible and operable at 375px width rather than rendering off-screen.

criteria.name: shared_state_coherence_across_surfaces
criteria.description: A change made in one surface — creating, editing, deleting, bulk mutating, undoing, redoing, or importing — is immediately reflected in every other surface that shows the same data (Library list, stage pins, counts, category tally, detail panel, export preview) without a reload; no surface ever shows stale data another surface already updated

criteria.name: seeded_reset_multi_facet_round_trip
criteria.description: Scripted probe: create an event, toggle a category off, type a search, narrow the year window, open Export once, and switch mode; confirm localStorage and sessionStorage remain empty throughout; then reload — every facet coherently returns to the seeded baseline (seeded corpus, default categories, empty search, default year window, empty undo stacks), never a mix of surviving and reset facets

criteria.name: keyboard_operable_chrome_controls
criteria.description: Every chrome control (mode switch, Filters, About, Reset filters, Undo, Redo, Export timeline, Import timeline, form fields, scrubber thumbs, bulk actions) is reachable and operable with the keyboard alone, showing a visible focus indicator on each

criteria.name: dialogs_trap_and_return_focus
criteria.description: The About modal, Filters drawer, and Export drawer expose dialog semantics, trap keyboard focus while open, and return focus to the control that opened them on close

criteria.name: validation_exposed_to_assistive_tech
criteria.description: Form validation messages and import errors are exposed to assistive technology (e.g. an aria-live region, role=alert, or aria-describedby wiring on the field) in addition to being shown visually

criteria.name: interactive_within_two_seconds
criteria.description: On a local cold load, the app renders and is interactive (a pin or chrome control responds) within 2 seconds

criteria.name: console_clean_during_full_exercise
criteria.description: No console errors or warnings appear during a full exercise of the app — panning, zooming, filtering, creating, editing, deleting, bulk actions, undo/redo, exporting, importing, and stepping through details

criteria.name: stage_and_library_stay_smooth
criteria.description: Panning and scrubbing the stage stay smooth with no visible hitching while the pins reposition, and scrolling the Library list fast stays smooth through the full seeded corpus

criteria.name: export_compiled_from_live_store
criteria.description: Export JSON and CSV previews are compiled from the live session store under the HistoryEvent contract: after a create or edit, reopening or refreshing the export drawer shows the mutated title/type/timestamp/mediaRefs/detail without reload

criteria.name: import_replaces_shared_store
criteria.description: A successful Timeline JSON import with document media-history-timeline replaces the shared events collection and filter/window fields so Library, stage, scrubber, tally, and a subsequent export all agree including type, timestamp, and mediaRefs

criteria.name: create_record_is_request_body_shape
criteria.description: After a valid create, the Library row and detail panel show the submitted HistoryEvent request-body fields (title, type, timestamp, mediaRefs, year, place, categories, summary, detail) and a subsequent Timeline JSON events entry matches that same shape

criteria.name: in_memory_only_no_storage
criteria.description: Throughout create, filter, export, and import exercises, localStorage and sessionStorage remain empty (good-app in-memory genre)

criteria.name: create_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Create flow: submitting a valid HistoryEvent (title, type, timestamp, mediaRefs, year, place, categories, summary, detail) adds exactly one Library row showing title and type, increases the visible count by one, updates the category tally, and shows a stage pin when in range — without reload

criteria.name: invalid_create_shows_inline_validation
criteria.description: Create flow: empty title, type outside the closed enum, non-Z or cross-field-invalid timestamp, empty mediaRefs, empty place, empty summary, empty detail, missing categories, or invalid year triggers immediate inline validation naming the field and adds no event

criteria.name: edit_flow_updates_related_displays
criteria.description: Edit flow: editing title, type, timestamp, mediaRefs, or year updates the Library row, pin position when year changed, open detail (including type and mediaRefs), and a subsequent export's matching event object without reload

criteria.name: delete_flow_updates_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Delete flow: deleting an event removes its Library row and pin, clears selection/detail, decreases the visible count by one, and drops it from the next export

criteria.name: view_switch_retains_state
criteria.description: Mode switch between Scrub/Explore and Library/Filter changes the canvas without reload and keeps the shared collection, filters, and year window

criteria.name: last_delete_reveals_empty_state
criteria.description: After the last user-managed delete (or filtering to zero matches), the empty state is clear and visible in the list/stage region

criteria.name: filters_update_all_surfaces
criteria.description: Filter flow: toggling a category or narrowing the year window updates Library rows, stage pins, and the category tally together

criteria.name: collapsible_chrome_preserves_workflow
criteria.description: Filters drawer or collapsed chrome can be hidden and reopened with workflow continuity (filters and year window preserved)

criteria.name: overlays_support_expected_flows
criteria.description: About modal, Filters drawer, Export drawer, and detail panel open/close as expected for exploration, edit, and export flows

criteria.name: flow_recovers_without_reload
criteria.description: Recovery: empty-state reset/create, clearing import errors, or closing overlays corrects the flow without a reload (no dead ends)

criteria.name: bulk_flow_updates_list_and_stage
criteria.description: Bulk flow: checking at least 2 rows and applying bulk Set category merges the chosen closed-enum category into each checked event's categories without removing unrelated tags; bulk Delete with confirm removes every checked row and drops the count by exactly that number

criteria.name: undo_flow_restores_prior_state
criteria.description: Undo flow: after creating an event, Undo removes that row, decrements the visible count by one, and restores the category tally; Redo restores the created event

criteria.name: export_flow_contains_session_titles
criteria.description: Export flow: after creating Signal Tower Demo with type First Appearance, timestamp 1920-01-01T00:00:00.000Z, mediaRefs containing signal-tower-demo, and Evening Broadcast with type Mass Adoption, open Export timeline — JSON events contain both titles with matching type/timestamp/mediaRefs, document is media-history-timeline, totals.eventCount matches the live collection length, yearWindow matches the scrubber, CSV contains both titles under the contract header, and Copy shows Copied

criteria.name: import_round_trip_flow
criteria.description: Import round-trip: export JSON after mutations, clear to empty/user-cleared, Import that JSON — Library titles/types/mediaRefs, pins, year window, filters, and tally reconstruct, and a fresh export's events array matches

criteria.name: reload_returns_seeded_baseline
criteria.description: A page reload returns the seeded corpus, default categories, empty search, default year window, and empty undo/redo stacks

criteria.name: exploration_first_composition
criteria.description: Timeline stage plus scrubber/library composition stays exploration-first, not a marketing card stack

criteria.name: empty_state_visually_present
criteria.description: Empty list/filter state is visually present when no events match

criteria.name: era_bands_and_category_pins
criteria.description: The canvas axis draws about seven labelled era bands and adaptive year ticks, and pins carry their category color

criteria.name: expressive_typography_and_paper_atmosphere
criteria.description: Headings and body text render in an expressive typeface (computed font-family is not Inter, Roboto, Arial, or a system default stack), and the stage carries a warm or cool paper-toned atmosphere rather than a plain white background

criteria.name: brand_header_and_document_title
criteria.description: The brand header shows the product name MediaHistoryTimeline with History of Media and Communication as the brand signal, the first viewport is the timeline tool itself, and the document title reflects MediaHistoryTimeline

criteria.name: category_color_and_detail_hierarchy
criteria.description: Event pins or list rows show their category color, and the detail panel presents a clear hierarchy: a kicker (year and place), a prominent title, type, mediaRefs list, category pills, summary, and detail visually distinct from the title

criteria.name: consistent_icon_set_across_chrome
criteria.description: Icons across the chrome (mode switch, filters, about, undo/redo, export/import, form controls) come from one consistent icon set with a uniform stroke style — no mixed icon styles

criteria.name: distinct_component_state_treatments
criteria.description: Buttons, inputs, and scrubber thumbs show distinct default, hover, focus, and disabled treatments (verified via computed styles while in each state), form fields show a distinct error treatment, and Undo/Redo show disabled treatment when stacks are empty

criteria.name: desktop_layout_fits_without_horizontal_scroll
criteria.description: At 1024px width and above, the stage, scrubber, and chrome controls are all visible without horizontal scrolling

criteria.name: narrow_width_chrome_reflow_usable
criteria.description: At widths of 768px and below, the chrome reflows — the header controls stack or collapse and the Library/Filter surface uses the full width — while the stage, scrubber, filtering, detail panel, and export drawer all remain usable

criteria.name: consistent_capitalization_convention
criteria.description: Headings, buttons, and category labels use one consistent capitalization convention (title case or sentence case) throughout the app

criteria.name: specific_verb_action_labels
criteria.description: Action labels are specific verbs such as Add event, Reset filters, Export timeline, Import timeline, Undo, and Redo rather than generic labels like Submit or OK where a specific one is possible

criteria.name: helpful_validation_and_empty_state_copy
criteria.description: Validation messages name the field and the fix, import errors name the import field, and the empty state copy explains what matched nothing and how to recover

criteria.name: export_drawer_tabs_and_preview
criteria.description: The export drawer shows Timeline JSON and Events CSV tabs with a scrollable preview plus Download and Copy affordances

criteria.name: category_tally_visually_distinct
criteria.description: The category tally strip is visually distinct from Library rows and updates without a layout jump that obscures the list

criteria.name: headings_use_consistent_capitalization
criteria.description: Where the app renders headings and section titles, they use consistent capitalization (one convention — title case or sentence case — throughout).

criteria.name: actions_use_specific_labels
criteria.description: Where the app renders button or action labels, they are specific verbs (Add event, Reset filters, Export timeline, Import timeline, Undo, Redo), not generic (Submit, OK) when a specific label is possible.

criteria.name: errors_name_problem_and_fix
criteria.description: Where the app renders error messages, they name the problem and the fix (Title is required, Year must be between -3200 and 2024, timestamp must end with Z, mediaRefs required), not just a rejection (Invalid).

criteria.name: empty_states_explain_next_step
criteria.description: Where the app renders empty states, the copy explains what matched nothing and how to reset filters or create an event.

criteria.name: body_copy_is_well_written
criteria.description: Where the app renders body or help copy (About, empty state, import errors), rate how free it is of spelling and grammatical errors.

criteria.name: terminology_is_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders labels for the same concept in multiple places, terminology is consistent (event vs item; Export timeline vs Download).

criteria.name: numbers_dates_and_units_are_consistent
criteria.description: Where the app renders years and counts, formatting is consistent (BCE/CE year readout, tally counts).

criteria.name: success_messages_are_specific
criteria.description: Where the app renders confirmation messages, they state what happened (Copied) rather than vague affirmations.

criteria.name: export_tab_labels_exact
criteria.description: Where the app renders export drawer tab labels, they read exactly Timeline JSON and Events CSV.
